latestEntry.notes: Week 6 Day 4 of Talk 4 (Week 2 of 2). Career & Professional focus: How to apply multidisciplinary thinking to career decisions. Core frameworks: 5 Helpful Notions (Simplification, Numerical Fluency, Inversion, Elementary Wisdom, Lollapalooza Effects). 5 case snapshots - New Coke fiasco (violated deprival super-reaction), tech startups using psychology (applied lollapalooza effects), engineer who only optimized for salary (man with a hammer syndrome), Berkshire insurance model (multidisciplinary synthesis), financial advisor who relied on one model (inversion failure). Key takeaway: Build a career latticework, not a specialty. Commitment: Run a current professional decision through all 5 notions before deciding. Message delivered successfully.
